content.questionText: Why did Maya join the photography society?
content.passage: When Maya moved to a new city for university, she felt nervous about making friends. During the first week, she joined a photography society because she loved taking pictures of street life. At the first meeting, members shared tips about lighting and composition. Maya volunteered to photograph the society's charity exhibition, which raised money for a local hospital. Working on the project helped her meet students from different courses. By the end of the term, she had not only improved her technical skills but also built a close group of friends who still travel together during holidays.

choices.text: Because she enjoyed photographing street life
Because she wanted to work in a hospital

authoringMetadata.questionText: Why did Maya join the photography society?

content.questionText: Gap (1): fresh produce ___ expensive
content.passage: Urban gardening has become popular among young professionals who live in flats. Many people grow herbs and vegetables on balconies because fresh produce (1) ___ expensive in supermarkets. Community gardens also offer shared spaces where neighbours can (2) ___ advice and tools. Experts recommend starting with easy plants such as lettuce or mint, which grow quickly and need little (3) ___. Some cities provide free workshops so residents learn how to compost and save (4) ___. Although space is limited, careful planning can turn a small corner into a productive and (5) ___ garden. In the long term, gardening can reduce stress and encourage people to spend more time (6) ___.

content.questionText: Which sentence best fits gap 1? (after the opening sentence about navigation)
content.passage: [A] For centuries, people have looked to the night sky for navigation and inspiration. [B] Today, light pollution in cities makes it harder to see stars clearly. [C] However, dark-sky parks protect areas where astronomers and tourists can observe constellations. [D] These parks also support wildlife that depends on natural darkness. [E] As a result, several countries have introduced laws to reduce unnecessary outdoor lighting. [F] Visiting a dark-sky park can be an unforgettable experience for families and students alike.

choices.text: [B] Today, light pollution in cities makes it harder to see stars clearly.
[F] Visiting a dark-sky park can be an unforgettable experience for families and students alike.
[D] These parks also support wildlife that depends on natural darkness.

authoringMetadata.questionText: Which sentence best fits gap 1? (after the opening sentence about navigation)
